title: Final warmup: real-world prose
description: One step before the tournament — flowing prose
text: One lesson to go. You've come a long way: from finding F and J by feel, to writing essays faster than most adults can think them. Take a breath. The next lesson is a comprehensive exam — pass it for the Teen Mastery certificate.

tips.target: One lesson to go. You've come a long way: from finding F and J by feel, to writing essays faster than most
adults can think them. Take a breath. The next lesson is a comprehensive exam — pass it for the Teen Mastery certificate.

character_tips.anna: One lesson left. Breathe. You've trained for this.
character_tips.maxim: Final warmup. Hands ready, mind calm.
character_tips.klavochka: One step from the throne, my hero 👑
